history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An advertisement-style graphic with bold blue and neon text promotes a “JUAL BOT PREMIUM” service alongside a robotic character and a stylized illustrated character.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a large, high-contrast promotional layout dominated by the headline “JUAL BOT PREMIUM” and a pricing section listing multiple time-based packages labeled “DAFTAR PAKET.” On the right side, an illustrated person with spiky white hair and blue eyes points toward the center while a small cartoon-like robot appears at the bottom left.

Setting:
The entire image is a stylized digital poster with a dark, starry, glowing background and neon blue lighting effects, suggesting an online promotional theme rather than a real-world setting.

Visual Details:
The color palette is primarily deep navy and electric blue with glowing highlights, light streaks, and diamond-shaped icons. The typography is thick and blocky for the headline, while the package list appears in stacked rectangular buttons with blue gradients and white text. Several rows show “Rp” prices in bright white, and each package duration has a corresponding “premium” price column. A right-side vertical panel contains feature icons in hexagon-like frames, each paired with short feature text. At the bottom, a section with a gift icon and a check-mark list appears near “KENAPA HARUS PAKAI BOT KAMI?” On the lower edge, there are two phone-number-like lines with “ORDER SEKARANG!” to the right and an additional “YUK” label above it. The composition is centered on the pricing grid, with the illustrated pointed figure on the upper-right drawing attention to the package area.

Practical Summary:
The image is a promotional poster for “JUAL BOT PREMIUM” with a pricing table for multiple subscription durations and a feature list on the right. It also includes reasons to use the bot, check-mark bullet points, and two order phone-number lines with “ORDER SEKARANG!” at the bottom.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Notes
- Teks pada bagian judul terlihat seperti **“JUAl BOT PREMIUM”** (huruf **“I”** vs **“A”/spasi** kurang jelas dari gambar). Saya menyalin apa yang tampak: **JUAl**.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A vibrant, futuristic advertisement poster for "JUAL BOT PREMIUM" (Premium Bot Sale). The central focus is a stylized anime character with spiky white hair and glowing blue eyes, pointing forward with a finger that crackles with electric blue energy. He is positioned on the right side of the poster, set against a dark, dynamic background filled with abstract blue lightning and energy effects.

To the left of the character, a cute, white robot with blue accents and a friendly expression is featured prominently. The text "JUAL BOT PREMIUM" is displayed in large, bold, metallic 3D letters with a blue glow, dominating the top of the poster. Below this, smaller text reads "FITUR LENGKAP • CEPAT • STABIL • 24/7 ONLINE" and "BOT SERBA BISA, SOLUSI SEMUA KEBUTUHAN!" (Complete Features • Fast • Stable • 24/7 Online / All-purpose Bot, Solution for All Needs!).

The poster is divided into sections. On the left, there's a "DAFTAR PAKET" (Package List) showing various subscription durations with prices: "1 Minggu" (1 Week) at Rp15.000/Rp17.000, "1 Bulan" (1 Month) at Rp25.000/Rp28.000, "3 Bulan" (3 Months) at Rp35.000/Rp37.000, "6 Bulan" (6 Months) at Rp45.000/Rp48.000, "12 Bulan" (12 Months) at Rp55.000/Rp59.000, and "Permanen" (Permanent) at Rp65.000/Rp70.000. Each package is represented by a blue diamond icon.

On the right side, under the heading "FITUR UNGGULAN" (Featured Advantages), there are several icons with descriptions: "FITUR LENGKAP" (Complete Features) with a checkmark icon, "CEPAT & STABIL" (Fast & Stable) with a lightning bolt icon, "24/7 ONLINE" with a clock icon, "ANTI RIBET" (No Hassle) with a thumbs-up icon, "UPDATE RUTIN" (Routine Update) with a refresh icon, and "SUPPORT FAST" with a headset icon.

At the bottom left, a section titled "KENAPA HARUS PAKAI BOT KAMI?" (Why Use Our Bot?) lists benefits with checkboxes: "Aman & Terpercaya" (Safe & Trustworthy), "Harga Terjangkau" (Affordable Price), "Fitur Super Lengkap" (Super Complete Features), "Cocok untuk Grup, Komunitas & Bisnis" (Suitable for Groups, Communities & Business), and "Bikin Aktivitas Makin Mudah!" (Make Activities Easier!). A blue gift box icon is present here.

The bottom center features a large green WhatsApp icon, followed by the text "TERTARIK?" (Interested?) and "MINAT CHAT NOMOR INI!" (Interested? Chat This Number!). Two phone numbers are listed: 6283130010117 and 6283163512044. To the right of the numbers, a button-like graphic says "YUK ORDER SEKARANG!" (Let's Order Now!) with a smaller version of the white robot.

The overall style is modern, futuristic, and high-tech, with a strong emphasis on blue and dark tones, accented by electric blue lighting and energy effects. The mood is exciting, dynamic, and persuasive, aiming to attract users with promises of advanced features and reliable service. The image has a glossy, digital art aesthetic.
